info.name: Dalil Services API — دليل الخدمات
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Dalil Services marketplace platform. Covers auth, providers, categories, services, requests, messages, payments (STC Pay), and admin endpoints.

**Setup:**
1. Import this file into Postman.
2. Create an environment and set `base_url` = `https://your-domain.com/api`.
3. Run **Auth → Login** — the token is stored automatically.
4. All protected routes will use `{{token}}` from that variable.

response.name: 200 OK
200 OK

Only works for free packages (price=0). Paid packages require STC Pay flow.
